queries.question: List event name from event records optionally linked to attendance where event notes is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "event"."event_name" FROM "event" LEFT JOIN "attendance" ON "event"."event_date" = "attendance"."event_date" WHERE "event"."notes" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List notes from event records optionally linked to budget where event type is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "event"."notes" FROM "event" LEFT JOIN "budget" ON "event"."event_name" = "budget"."event_name" WHERE "event"."type" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List category from budget records optionally linked to attendance where budget spent is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "budget"."category" FROM "budget" LEFT JOIN "attendance" ON "budget"."event_name" = "attendance"."event_name" WHERE "budget"."spent" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List event name from attendance records optionally linked to expense where attendance event date is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "attendance"."event_name" FROM "attendance" LEFT JOIN "expense" ON "attendance"."member_first_name" = "expense"."member_first_name" WHERE "attendance"."event_date" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List event name from attendance records optionally linked to income where attendance member last name is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "attendance"."event_name" FROM "attendance" LEFT JOIN "income" ON "attendance"."member_first_name" = "income"."member_first_name" WHERE "attendance"."member_last_name" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List event name from event records optionally linked to attendance where event type is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "event"."event_name" FROM "event" LEFT JOIN "attendance" ON "event"."event_date" = "attendance"."event_date" WHERE "event"."type" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to attendance where member phone is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "attendance" ON "member"."first_name" = "attendance"."member_first_name" WHERE "member"."phone" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to zip_code where member major name is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_city" = "zip_code"."city" WHERE "member"."major_name" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to zip_code where member email is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_city" = "zip_code"."city" WHERE "member"."email" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to expense where member major name is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "expense" ON "member"."first_name" = "expense"."member_first_name" WHERE "member"."major_name" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List event name from event records optionally linked to budget where event notes is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "event"."event_name" FROM "event" LEFT JOIN "budget" ON "event"."status" = "budget"."event_status" WHERE "event"."notes" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major name from member records optionally linked to major where member email is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_name" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "major" ON "member"."major_department" = "major"."department" WHERE "member"."email" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to zip_code where member phone is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_state" = "zip_code"."state" WHERE "member"."phone" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List major department from member records optionally linked to zip_code where member major name is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" LEFT JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_state" = "zip_code"."state" WHERE "member"."major_name" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List city from zip_code records optionally linked to member where zip_code county is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "zip_code"."city" FROM "zip_code" LEFT JOIN "member" ON "zip_code"."state" = "member"."member_state" WHERE "zip_code"."county" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List event name from attendance records optionally linked to budget where attendance member first name is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "attendance"."event_name" FROM "attendance" LEFT JOIN "budget" ON "attendance"."event_date" = "budget"."event_date" WHERE "attendance"."member_first_name" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List city from zip_code records optionally linked to member where zip_code type is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "zip_code"."city" FROM "zip_code" LEFT JOIN "member" ON "zip_code"."state" = "member"."member_state" WHERE "zip_code"."type" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List state from zip_code records optionally linked to member where zip_code state is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "zip_code"."state" FROM "zip_code" LEFT JOIN "member" ON "zip_code"."city" = "member"."member_city" WHERE "zip_code"."state" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List type and state from zip_code records where row id is not one of 188, 453.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "state" FROM "zip_code" WHERE "row_id" NOT IN (188, 453);

queries.question: List type and state from zip_code records where row id is not one of 188, 453, 59.
queries.sql: SELECT "type", "state" FROM "zip_code" WHERE "row_id" NOT IN (188, 453, 59);

queries.question: List major department from member records full-joined with major, attendance, event, budget, income, expense, zip_code using a row-id selector.
List major department and major name from member records full-joined with major, attendance, event, budget, income, expense, zip_code using a row-id selector.
List major department from member records full-joined with major, attendance, event, budget, income, expense, zip_code.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department" FROM "member" FULL OUTER JOIN "major" ON "member"."major_name" = "major"."major_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "attendance" ON "member"."first_name" = "attendance"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "event" ON "attendance"."event_name" = "event"."event_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "budget" ON "event"."event_name" = "budget"."event_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "income" ON "member"."first_name" = "income"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "expense" ON "income"."member_first_name" = "expense"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_state" = "zip_code"."short_state";

queries.question: List major department and major name from member records full-joined with major, attendance, event, budget, income, expense, zip_code.
queries.sql: SELECT "member"."major_department", "member"."major_name" FROM "member" FULL OUTER JOIN "major" ON "member"."major_name" = "major"."major_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "attendance" ON "member"."first_name" = "attendance"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "event" ON "attendance"."event_name" = "event"."event_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "budget" ON "event"."event_name" = "budget"."event_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "income" ON "member"."first_name" = "income"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "expense" ON "income"."member_first_name" = "expense"."member_first_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "zip_code" ON "member"."member_state" = "zip_code"."short_state";
